title: Daewoo 3.5L Slow Cooker – Compact Electric Cooker with Removable Ceramic Bowl & Glass Lid – 3 Heat Settings (Low, High, Keep Warm), Energy Efficient, Ideal for Small Families & Meal Prep, Black
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Compact 3.5L Capacity for Smaller Households – Perfectly sized for couples, singles, or small families looking to batch cook stews, curries, casseroles, and more
Simple 3 Heat Settings – Choose from Low, High or Keep Warm settings to suit your cooking schedule and keep meals ready to eat
Removable Ceramic Bowl & Glass Lid – Designed for even heat distribution and easy cleaning; dishwasher safe for added convenience
Energy Efficient 180W Performance – Uses less power than conventional ovens while delivering consistently delicious results
Sleek & Safe Design – Modern black exterior, cool-touch handles, and built-in overheat protection for peace of mind in the kitchen
description: From the manufacturer VARIABLE COOKING CONTROL This 3.5 litre Slow Cooker from Daewoo features 3 heat settings, ensuring your meals are perfectly cooked every time REMOVABLE STONEWARE POT To make cleaning a doddle, we've given the slow cooker a removable easy-clean stoneware bowl TEMPERED GLASS LID Keep an eye on your food with this strong, easily cleaned tempered glass lid, and LED indicator light that let's you check the status of the slow cooker

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Stainless steel; Stoneware pot; Dishwasher safe; 3 heat settings; Easy to clean; Power indicator
